sys_update_xml.name: sys_properties_89133d43307532107f44f4e479713945
sys_update_xml.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_properties"><sys_properties action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><choices/><description>Sets the session timeout, in minutes. Values exceeding 1440 minutes will be treated as one day.</description><ignore_cache>false</ignore_cache><is_private>false</is_private><name>glide.ui.session_timeout</name><read_roles/><suffix/><sys_class_name>sys_properties</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>system</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2025-12-18 08:55:34</sys_created_on><sys_id>89133d43307532107f44f4e479713945</sys_id><sys_mod_count>2</sys_mod_count><sys_name>glide.ui.session_timeout</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_properties_89133d43307532107f44f4e479713945</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-03-26 09:38:51</sys_updated_on><type>integer</type><value>60</value><write_roles/></sys_properties><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=89133d43307532107f44f4e479713945"/></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_properties_7ba34f105b030010da168d8fa881c7e4
sys_update_xml.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_properties"><sys_properties action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><choices/><description>When property is set to true, mobile app will check that device encryption is enabled. If encryption is not enabled, user won't be allowed to log into current instance on mobile</description><ignore_cache>false</ignore_cache><is_private>false</is_private><name>glide.sg.device_encryption_enabled</name><read_roles/><suffix/><sys_class_name>sys_properties</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2020-02-14 23:11:07</sys_created_on><sys_id>7ba34f105b030010da168d8fa881c7e4</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>glide.sg.device_encryption_enabled</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Mobile plugin" source="com.glide.sg">5a35218f303132107f44f4e4797139ad</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_properties_7ba34f105b030010da168d8fa881c7e4</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-03-26 09:37:10</sys_updated_on><type>boolean</type><value>true</value><write_roles/></sys_properties><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=7ba34f105b030010da168d8fa881c7e4"/></record_update>
